message:
fix(tests): correct prerequisite check assertion count

Update deploy_cloudflare test to expect 1 missing prerequisite when
wrangler is not installed, rather than 2. The test now correctly
validates that only the wrangler CLI check fails when no API
credentials are configured.

The assertion now also validates the specific error message contains
"wrangler CLI not installed" for better test clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
